source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Question: 67
The scatter plot of study time in hours versus test scores in a statistics class is shown below. What can be said about the relationship between time spent studying and test scores?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: More time spent studying is related to higher test scores.

choice_map.A: More time spent studying is related to lower test scores.
choice_map.B: Less time spent studying is related to higher test scores.
choice_map.C: More time spent studying is related to higher test scores.
choice_map.D: Higher test scores are caused by more time spent studying.
choice_map.E: There is no discernible relationship between study time and test scores.

extraction_notes: 答案字段为数字索引 2，但仅凭当前记录无法确定其是 0-based 还是 1-based，故保留原值。
image 字段是 PIL.Image 对象描述，不是可直接提取的路径或 URL。
